examples: Old World genus of annual to perennial herbs: woad.
Plants used in dyeing - Woad, Weld, Madder, Sumach.
Their bare flesh is heavily decorated with tattoos made by their women with the dye of madder and woad, using the pinpricks of bone needles.
The crash happened at about 19:40 BST at the automated half-barrier crossing on Woad Lane in Great Coates, North East Lincolnshire.
